name: thesis-engine
description: Research feeder for vibe-thesis projects. Discovers cutting-edge thesis topics, gathers primary sources / opposing positions / methodological precedents via web search, and emits research notes + a BibTeX bibliography in vibe-thesis-shaped subdirectories ready to drop into ThesisStudio. Optional Smart Brevity blog adapter for BlogStudio.
author: Estevan Hernandez

port.notes: Manifest mirrors the Claude Code plugin.json version. thesis-engine has no loggers, so nothing reads plugin_version here — pure bookkeeping, kept for family consistency. Antigravity discovers workflows from .agent/workflows/ (the eponymous skill collapsed to the router /thesis-engine; the 4 stage commands are /thesis-engine-<cmd> workflows). No .agent/skills/ in this port (0 skills); situational reference data lives in .agent/references/, scripts in .agent/scripts/.
